pi_items.source: Task description line: 'Draft or send an email to it-security@company.com'. Verified in verifier.py line 27 as the target email recipient for the recommendation. Consistent across all references.
Task description: 'Create a new IMAP folder named Trusted-Senders'. Verified in verifier.py line 28 as trusted_folder_target. Consistent with task requirements.
Task description: 'Create a new IMAP folder named Blocklist-Candidates'. Verified in verifier.py line 29 as blocklist_folder_target. Consistent with task requirements.
Task description: 'move at least 8 legitimate emails'. Verified in verifier.py line 30 as min_trusted. Verified in export_result.sh scoring logic.
Task description: 'move at least 5 suspicious/spam emails'. Verified in verifier.py line 31 as min_blocklist. Verified in export_result.sh scoring logic.

privileged_info_summary: Task setup loads exactly 50 legitimate emails (ham) from SpamAssassin corpus into Inbox and 20 spam emails into Junk folder. User must create two IMAP folders: Trusted-Senders (receive ≥8 emails) and Blocklist-Candidates (receive ≥5 emails). User must draft/send email to it-security@company.com with subject 'Sender Domain Blocklist Recommendation' containing ≥2 sender domains, ≥1 numeric statistic, and security terminology (blocklist/allowlist/etc). Login credentials: ga/password123. Verifier requires ≥65 points: folders created (+10 each), populated correctly (+15-20), email drafted to correct recipient (+20), with domains (+10), statistics (+5), and security terms (+10).
